## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss marketing ops review and planning for potential additional funding](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on presenting a base marketing plan for FY24 and potential incremental investments if additional funding is secured](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Avoid getting too granular on organizational structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Align with Anoop on the approach over the next few days before presenting to the broader team](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

## Topics

### Base FY24 Marketing Plan

  - [Present the current base plan for FY24 marketing with existing resources/budget](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Include pipeline projections, CAC metrics, and revenue goals](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Incremental Investment Opportunities

  - [Outline potential high-impact programs that could be launched with additional funding](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [E.g. SF marketing event space, strategic acquisitions, partner co-marketing](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Estimate incremental budget needs and expected ROI for each opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Alignment with Leadership

  - [Get Anoop's feedback on the proposed approach over the next few days](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Avoid surprising leadership with misaligned plans during the presentation](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Focus on marketing priorities vs. excessive organizational planning](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to draft base FY24 marketing plan and incremental investment options](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Review drafts with Anoop for feedback before broader presentation](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Align on appropriate scope and depth for this exercise](https://fathom.video/share/YssWz4PuUjcLZyjxgx5mMNPtA5EMECwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
